backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing test management and student response CRUD operations with authentication for admin actions, automated scoring logic, IELTS band calculation, and blob storage integration for media files.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining all data types (Test, Question, StudentResponse, etc.) and a run function that preserves persistent actor state during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to restoring test creation functionality, verifying CreateTest mutation with authentication, and ensuring QuestionBuilder handles all question types and media uploads.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and utilities describing their functionality including test management, question building, student responses, authentication, and media upload handling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, buttons, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with basic meta tags, page title 'Hexa's Beanibazar', root div, and script tag loading the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing global state for view modes (welcome, test, results, responses) and coordinating between TestManagementPanel sidebar and RightPanelContainer with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication dialog modal with username/password inputs, error handling, loading states, and callbacks for successful login to enable test creation operations.
Dialog component for creating new tests with form fields for title, type, instructions, time limit, and questions. Handles validation, submission via mutation hook, and displays errors with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying branding text 'Powered By Hexa's Beanibazar' and developer credit 'Developed By Sayem Ahtesham'.
Form component for building individual test questions with support for multiple question types, options management, and file upload (audio/image) with progress tracking using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/ReadingTestLayou: Two-panel layout for reading tests with scrollable passage on the left and all questions displayed on the right, handling answer changes for each question.
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Detailed view of a single student response showing student info, test details, scores, band score with color coding, and individual question answers with correct/incorrect indicators.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: Table view of all student responses with search functionality, displaying student name, batch, test, date, score, and band with actions to view details or delete responses.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Results display after test submission showing score, IELTS band, accuracy, time taken, and toggleable correct answers view with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: Container component that conditionally renders TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome screen based on the current app view mode and state.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: Modal dialog that collects student name and batch number before allowing test start, with validation and non-dismissible behavior.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking interface that manages student registration, timer, fullscreen mode, answer collection, and test submission with support for both reading and standard test layouts.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Left sidebar panel for managing tests with search/filter functionality, test creation, deletion (with auth), and navigation to view responses.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders individual test questions with support for multiple question types (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short/long answer, etc.) and displays associated media (audio/image).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Session-based authentication hook with hardcoded credentials stored in sessionStorage, providing login/logout and credential retrieval functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Hook that manages fullscreen mode state and provides functions to enter/exit fullscreen with event listener cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on tests and student responses, using the backend actor with query invalidation and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Provides a hook to filter student responses by student name based on a search term.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Manages filtering state for tests by search term and test type, returning filtered results.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Manages test creation/editing form state including questions, validation, and conversion between form data and backend Test type with support for various question types and media.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Handles test submission logic including answer grading, band score calculation, and creating student response records via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Provides a timer hook with start, pause, reset controls and formatted time display for tracking test duration.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space for UI components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, container settings, border radius variables, shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a fix request to restore broken test creation functionality in CreateTestPanel, useTestForm, and related components. Three features identified covering form reversion, mutation validation, and QuestionBuilder component handling.
